title: Stenanthera pungens

Stenanthera pungens is classified in the genus Stenanthera, which is a small group of plants within the family Acanthaceae. The exact classification of Stenanthera pungens is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Lamiales, Family: Acanthaceae, Genus: Stenanthera, Species: S. pungens.
